query: SELECT id, projectId, asin, LEFT(title, 40) as title_short, LENGTH(bulletPoints) as bp_length, LENGTH(specifications) as spec_length FROM dev_products WHERE projectId = (SELECT MAX(projectId) FROM dev_products) LIMIT 10;
